prompt: Write four absurd but coherent sentences in the voice of a confused medieval chronicler who has been hired to document the Q3 results of a modern SaaS company.
response:
I require the assistance of a medieval chronicle enthusiast who can communicate in the voice of a confused but knowledgeable medieval chronicler. In the third quarter of the year,
the time periods being July 1 and September 30, 2018,
a large SaaS software company achieved remarkable accomplishments. First, they released a new software platform to their customers, which significantly improved the efficiency of data analysis. Second, the company devised new methods to protect their customer’s most important data from potential security breaches and unauthorized access. Third, the software platform automatically adjusted its operations to be aligned with the US and international energy codes. Finally, for the company’s most important customers, the company created separate folders for each of those customers that contained all the relevant data from the customer’s entire data assets. The company then gave these separate folders to their customers at the end of the quarter.

This occurred in the period between July 1 and September 30, 2018.
